corrections.location: start of body, first word before τοὺς
corrections.note: Section/paragraph marker is delta, not alpha.
Printed text again has one μ.

corrections.current: εγω] λεγω ℵ* (improb poste ras ις)
corrections.correct: εγω] λεγω ℵ* (improb poste ras iς)
corrections.note: Latin note prints roman i, not Greek iota.
Apparatus reads Ιωσηφον and the hyphenated form -ισηφ-.

corrections.current: Η ἢ ΗΤ᾿ ℵ* η᾿ ἢ ℵc.a, c.b
corrections.correct: Η ἢ Η᾿ ℵ* η᾿ ἢ ℵc.a, c.b
corrections.note: The starred ℵ reading is Η ἢ Η᾿, not ΗΤ᾿.
Siglum is starred ℵ, not ℵ superscript 1.

corrections.current: Ναβαταιοις] αναβαταις οι ℵ Αναβατταιοις V
corrections.correct: Ναβαταιοις] αναβαταις οι ℵ Ἀναβατταίοις V
corrections.note: Printed V reading is accented Ἀναβατταίοις.

corrections.current: Αλεμοις ℵ* Αλεμμοις ℵc.a, c.b (vid) Αλμ. V
corrections.correct: Αλεμοις ℵ* Ἀλεμμοις ℵc.a, c.b (vid) Ἀλμ. V

corrections.current: Κασφων ℵ* (Κασφωρ ℵc.a) καὶ Σαφω V
corrections.note: V reading is Κασφω, not καὶ Σαφω.

notes: Running head matches. Body otherwise agrees with image through v. 28. Apparatus mostly correct, but a few sigla/lettering errors and one name misread.
